title: Register a programme
description: A programme is born at Phase 1 with all six phases and five gates seeded.

steps.title: Code and name
steps.description: The code is how the programme is referenced everywhere.
steps.voiceScript: Give the programme a code and a name. The code is how it is referenced everywhere else.
steps.captionText: Give the programme a code and a name. The code is how it is referenced everywhere else.
steps.fallbackMessage: Code and name: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: The design path
steps.description: Standard rooftop, or a generation station.
steps.voiceScript: Choose the design path. Standard builds a system at every site. Generation station builds one plant that supplies them all.
steps.captionText: Choose the design path. Standard builds a system at every site. Generation station builds one plant that supplies them all.
steps.fallbackMessage: The design path: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: The sponsor
steps.description: Chosen from your members. Never typed.
steps.voiceScript: The sponsor is chosen from your organisation's own members. A sponsor who is not in the organisation is not a sponsor.
steps.captionText: The sponsor is chosen from your organisation's own members. A sponsor who is not in the organisation is not a sponsor.
steps.fallbackMessage: The sponsor: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Register it
steps.description: It opens at Phase 1, Initiation, awaiting the Initiation gate.
steps.voiceScript: Register it, and it opens at Phase 1, Initiation, with all five gates waiting.
steps.captionText: Register it, and it opens at Phase 1, Initiation, with all five gates waiting.
steps.fallbackMessage: Register it: not visible on this screen yet.
